issues.title: Locale routing behavior changed without middleware regression tests
issues.rationale: The diff introduces locale-enforcing middleware and a complex matcher regex, which is a high-impact routing surface. No accompanying middleware/integration test changes are present in the diff, so regressions in redirect/exclusion behavior are likely to go undetected.
issues.recommendation: Add middleware integration tests that assert behavior for `/`, `/(ko|en)` paths, nested localized routes, and excluded paths (`/api`, `/_next`, static assets, `/login`). Include both redirect and pass-through expectations.

issues.title: Locale-dependent prompt branching lacks unit/integration coverage
issues.rationale: Prompt behavior now depends on optional locale and brittle string replacement. This is easy to regress (e.g., base prompt text edits silently break replacement) and the diff does not add tests for `ko/en/default` branches or request-to-prompt locale propagation.
issues.recommendation: Add unit tests for `buildTravelSystemPrompt` covering `ko`, `en`, and undefined locale. Add an API-level test that posts `locale` through `/api/chat` and asserts the generated system prompt variant.

issues.title: Sitemap generation introduces nondeterministic timestamps without test seam
issues.rationale: Using `new Date()` inside sitemap output makes results time-variant, which complicates stable assertions and tends to create flaky or brittle tests. The diff adds no tests around sitemap determinism or URL completeness across locales.
issues.recommendation: Inject a clock or derive stable timestamps for static routes, then add sitemap unit tests with mocked destination data to verify deterministic output and locale URL coverage.

issues.title: DestinationGrid state transitions are untested (search/filter/pagination coupling)
issues.rationale: The grid adds several coupled UI states (country filter, free-text search, pagination reset) that are prone to regression through future refactors. No component tests are added in the diff to lock expected behavior for these transitions.
issues.recommendation: Add component tests (RTL) covering: page reset on search/filter changes, empty result handling, pagination bounds, and locale-aware link rendering after filtering.

issues.title: New destination seeding path added without idempotency or data-shape tests
issues.rationale: The diff introduces a new seed path and multilingual JSON shaping that multiple pages depend on, but there are no tests in the diff validating idempotent upsert behavior, published filtering assumptions, or JSON field structure expectations.
issues.recommendation: Add Prisma integration tests for seed idempotency and field shape (`description/highlights` ko/en keys), plus service-level tests confirming only `published=true` records are returned.
